candidates.why: Direct total top-line revenue label; preferred as a revenue line item and matches Net Sales values.
Deferred revenue is a liability, not recognized revenue.
Also a valid top-line revenue label; useful fallback if Total Revenue is missing in some years.

candidates.row_label: as a percentage of net sales
candidates.why: This is not a revenue line item.

variables.notes: Using revenue priority list with Total Revenue first, then Net Sales as fallback.

candidates.why: Best match for cost of sales/direct production and service costs; broad operating input cost line directly under expenses.
Only a component of inventory-related costs, not the broadest COGS line.

variables.notes: Selected the broader direct-cost line rather than a narrower purchases component.

candidates.why: Operating overhead/service-related expense and a plausible SG&A component.
Personnel costs are classic SG&A overhead component.
Broad overhead bucket; acceptable when no explicit SG&A subtotal exists.
Subcomponent of other operating expenses; less preferable than the parent overhead bucket.
Dedicated R&D expense exists, but it appears below Operating Result, so should not be added to XSGA under the placement rule.
Balance sheet asset, not period SG&A expense.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A row exists. Selected best overhead buckets and excluded subtotal-like 'Other operating expenses - rest'. Excluded R&D from XSGA because the dedicated 'R&D' line appears below 'Operating Result', so including it would violate the placement rule.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: This is amortization of capitalized R&D, not the core R&D expense line.
Dedicated R&D expense line; best semantic match.
Capitalized asset balance, not income statement R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Balance sheet contra-asset, not current-period R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Net - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing value, not R&D expense.

variables.notes: Mapped to dedicated R&D expense line. It appears below Operating Result, so it is not also included in XSGA_COMPONENTS.

candidates.why: Semantically relevant but appears empty in preview; keep behind direct populated interest line.
Broader finance-cost bucket; fallback if direct interest expense unavailable.
Semantically relevant but appears empty and less precise than direct interest expense.
Direct interest expense line and best match.
Direct label but appears empty in preview; plausible alternate over time.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Only a lease-interest subset/supplemental item, not total interest expense.

variables.notes: Priority list uses the direct interest expense label first, then alternate direct label, then broader financial expenses as fallback.

candidates.row_label: Equity holders of the parent company
candidates.why: Income statement attribution of earnings, not balance sheet equity.

candidates.row_label: equity holders of the parent company
candidates.why: Income statement attribution of earnings, not balance sheet equity.

candidates.row_label: Exchange rate differences on translating foreign operations for equity holders of the parent company
candidates.why: OCI component, not book equity.

candidates.row_label: Result for the financial period attributable to equity holders of the parent company
candidates.why: Net income attribution, not equity.
Not shareholders' equity.
Investment asset, not equity.
Component only, not total book equity.

candidates.row_label: Total equity attributable to equity holders of the parent company
candidates.why: Best match for book equity excluding non-controlling interests, which avoids double counting with MIB.
Total equity includes NCI; less preferred because MIB is separately available.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity attributable to equity holders of the parent company

variables.notes: Preferred parent-only equity to exclude non-controlling interests. Included Total Equity only as fallback.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution line, not balance sheet minority equity.
Income statement attribution line, not balance sheet minority equity.
Income statement OCI attribution line, not balance sheet minority equity.
Direct balance sheet minority equity line; best match.
Equivalent balance sheet label; useful fallback.

variables.notes: Used balance sheet minority equity labels only, with direct NCI label first.
